project.empty_state.prompt: Select an option below to use {name}

settings.appearance.custom_line_height.d: Custom line height value (must be at least 1.0).

settings.appearance.icon_theme_selection: Custom icon set Zed uses for files and directories.
settings.appearance.light_icon_theme.des: Icon theme used when the mode is light, or when the mode is system and the system is in light appearance.
settings.appearance.light_theme.descript: Theme used when the mode is light, or when the mode is system and the system is in light appearance.

settings.appearance.minimum_contrast_for: Minimum APCA perceptual contrast to maintain when rendering text over highlighted backgrounds.
settings.appearance.multi_cursor_modifie: Modifier key used to add multiple cursors.
settings.appearance.rounded_selection.de: Whether text selections should use rounded corners.
Highlight all matches of the selected text.

settings.appearance.theme_mode.title: Mode
settings.appearance.theme_name.title: Theme Name
settings.appearance.theme_selection.desc: Choose a fixed theme, or dynamically choose a theme based on appearance and light or dark mode.

settings.appearance.wrap_guides.title: Wrap Guides
settings.developer.feature_flags.title: Feature Flags
Collect timing data for foreground and background executor tasks for viewing with `zed: open performance profiler`. May increase memory usage.

settings.general.preview_channel.descrip: Which settings apply only to Zed Preview builds.

settings.general.restore_on_startup.desc: What Zed restores from the previous session when it opens.
settings.general.restore_unsaved_buffers: Whether to restore unsaved buffers after restarting.
settings.general.settings_profiles.descr: Any number of settings profiles that can be temporarily overlaid onto existing user settings.
settings.general.settings_profiles.title: Settings Profiles

settings.general.telemetry_metrics.title: Telemetry Metrics
settings.general.title: General
settings.general.trust_all_projects.desc: Automatically trust all projects when opening Zed, avoiding restricted mode so all features are available without authorizing each new project.
settings.general.use_system_path_prompts: Use native system dialogs for Open and Save As.
